content: Self-Refine’s unsupervised iterative self-feedback framework can act as a unifying base architecture to ground fragmented LLM self-reflection mechanisms, turning inconsistent multi-perspective reflection outputs into a stepwise improvement cycle rather than treating conflicting perspectives as a problem to be corrected. This merged approach leverages Self-Refine’s strength of requiring no extra training or data to make multi-perspective reflection accessible for resource-constrained LLM deployments.
